tracks.rawText: 5:14Copper Prayerv5.5CoverPsychedelic rock with metal edge: dreamy analog synth pads, vinyl crackle, distant feedback, and slow-burning fuzz guitar leads, Hypnotic female vocals sit in lush reverb and delay, with soaring chorus layers, Thick bass, tom-heavy drums, phased arpeggios, and cosmic wah-soaked solos drive a mystical, heavy, expansive texturePublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 2:15Trap Brass Teethv5.5Trap and dubstep hybrid featuring aggressive electronic production, The track centers on a heavy, distorted sub-bass that follows a syncopated trap rhythm, A sharp, metallic snare hits on the third beat of each bar, complemented by rapid-fire 32nd-note hi-hat rolls, A high-pitched, dissonant synth lead plays a repetitive two-note motif with a glissando effect, The arrangement includes cinematic percussion hits, orchestral brass stabs, and a prominent vocal sample with a pitch-shifted, distorted quality, A recurring 'It's a trap' vocal drop signals transitions, The tempo is 140 BPM in the key of F minor, The structure features a build-up with rising pitch risers and a heavy drop characterized by a growling bass synth and aggressive percussionPublishRemix
tracks.title: Trap Brass Teeth
